tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork13 (Quantum Entanglement)
tags.description: Adapted from the quantum particle pairs sketch. Each pair shares a spin phase (partner is always +π out of phase). Particles attract when beyond entangle_range and bounce off canvas edges. A pulsing spin ring visualises the phase. Dashed link drawn as manual short-line segments. Interference node appears at pair midpoint with alpha mapped to |sin(phase*2)|.
